word: H4182 - מֹורֶשֶׁת גַּת - Môwresheth Gath - mo-reh'-sheth gath - Moresheth-gath

sections.paragraph:
Original: מורשׁת גּת

Transliteration: môresheth gath

Phonetic: mo-reh'-sheth gath

BDB Definition:

Moresheth-gath = "possession of Gath"
  1. a place apparently in the neighbourhood of Gath and probably the home of the prophet Micah

Origin: from H3423 and H1661

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
